interface.shortDescription: Curated AI-agent marketplace for DeFi on-chain interaction — Foundry/Bankr backends and protocol *-ops skills (not architecture/dev test dumps)

metadata.description: Curated AI-agent marketplace for DeFi on-chain interaction — Foundry/Bankr backends and protocol *-ops skills (not architecture/dev test dumps)
metadata.notes: Claude Code is the source of truth. Skills (SKILL.md) are portable. Hooks and Claude-specific automation may not fully apply on Codex.

plugins.name: foundry-agent
plugins.description: Foundry cast/anvil runtime for AI agents: RPC reads/writes, fork rehearsal, multi-step forge scripts, and safety gates

plugins.name: bankr-ops
plugins.description: Thin Bankr wallet API execution backend (auth, portfolio, sign/submit) — optional alternative to foundry-agent

plugins.name: defi-primitives
plugins.description: ERC20, WETH, approvals, and unit conversion cast runbooks for AI agents

plugins.name: permit2-ops

plugins.name: balancer-v3-ops
plugins.description: Balancer V3 agent cast runbooks for vault reads and router ops

plugins.name: indexedex-ops
